message:
feat(replay): scenario matrix runner for baseline-vs-candidate sweeps (ft-og6q6.4.3)

Adds ScenarioMatrixRunner that executes all (artifact, override) pairs from
a TOML-based .ftmatrix config, computing decision diffs with fail_fast support.
Includes DiffSummary, MatrixResult, ProgressEvent, and 27+22=49 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
